source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Inelastic neutrino scattering in the quark model. Consider the scattering of neutrinos on free, massless quarks. We will simplify things and discuss only strangeness‐conserving reactions, i.e. transitions only between the $u$ and $d$ quarks. Assume that inelastic $u$ (or $\bar{u}$)-nucleon cross sections are given by the sum of the cross sections for the four processes that have been listed above. Derive the quark model prediction for the ratio of the total cross section for antineutrino‐nucleon scattering compared with neutrino‐nucleon scattering, $\sigma^{\bar{u} N} / \sigma^{u N}$.
extraction_notes: image fields contain PIL object representations rather than actual file paths or URLs
question asks for $\sigma^{\bar{u} N} / \sigma^{u N}$, while the reasoning text explicitly derives $\sigma(\nu N) / \sigma(\bar{\nu} N)=3$

issues: metadata.extraction_notes indicates a content mismatch: the question asks for sigma^{bar{u} N} / sigma^{u N}, while the reasoning text derives sigma(nu N) / sigma(bar{nu} N) = 3
metadata.image_paths contains PIL object representations rather than actual file paths or URLs

image_dependency: 题目字段明确标注 requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false。
题干提到“the four processes that have been listed above”，当前文本中未给出这四个过程，说明解题依赖上游图像或配套内容。
asset_registry_record 中有 1 张已存在图片，且图像可读性摘要已提供。
multi_step: 题目要求先基于夸克模型汇总多个反应截面，再比较反中微子与中微子总截面，至少包含组合与比值推导两步。
题干限定了自由无质量夸克、仅讨论守奇异反应等条件，解答需要在这些物理假设下筛选并整合过程。
答案是单个数字，但得到该数字通常不是直接读取，而是经过若干反应通道求和后推导。
verifiability: answer_type 为 numeric，给定答案为单值“3”，最终结果形式清晰，便于规则核验。
题目要求的是明确的截面比值，若过程定义一致，可通过物理推导复核答案。
但 asset_registry_record 的 issues 指出题干/推理对象存在比值方向不一致，这降低了可稳定核验性。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产均存在，样本仍保留了可恢复的核心语义支撑，不宜过早拒绝。
存在明显内容不一致：题干询问的是 sigma^{bar{u} N} / sigma^{u N}，而现有推理文本对应的是 sigma(nu N) / sigma(bar{nu} N)=3，降低了可直接入池的可靠性。
题干提到“the four processes that have been listed above”，说明解题依赖缺失的配套过程列表，当前文本单独使用时信息不完整。
答案为单个数值且可核验，但在题干依赖缺失且问答对象不一致的情况下，应降为后续复核优先而非直接保留。

normalization_notes: Normalized minor character/formatting noise in particle symbols.
Question explicitly depends on previously listed four processes, so image/context dependence remains.
